commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=38363322a597dbe5548f5cf0166cd004b68ef277)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes `src/cli/skills-cli.ts` so skills status commands pass `getRemoteSkillEligibility()` into `buildWorkspaceSkillStatus`.

PR surface: Source +5. Total +5 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: the standalone CLI path builds local skill status directly, while live remote-node state is populated in Gateway/runtime code. I did not run a live connected macOS node in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The branch needs contributor or maintainer revision plus real setup proof; ClawSweeper should not dispatch a repair marker while the external PR's proof gate is still missing.

target.title: fix(cli): pass remote eligibility to skills CLI commands
target.author: itxaiohanglover

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
